title: Fix webhook signature rejection for valid GitHub payloads
body:
Fixes #42.

## Problem
Valid GitHub webhook payloads were rejected when the signature header used uppercase hex.

## Changes
Normalize the digest comparison and keep timing-safe comparison.

## Verification
- npm test
- Replayed a signed fixture before and after the fix

## Risk
Low. The change is isolated to webhook signature parsing.
contributingText: Pull requests must include tests or explain why tests are not applicable.
